name: Codex Local Image Model
description: Experimental local Codex image model extension for text-to-image and image-to-image workflows.
author: DrHepa

metadata.setup_contract: user-managed Codex install+login, extension-managed SDK bootstrap+preflight

params_schema.label: Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Prompt text for Codex local image generation.

params_schema.label: Size
params_schema.tooltip: Requested output size forwarded to the Codex backend when supported.

params_schema.label: Quality
params_schema.tooltip: Requested quality hint forwarded to the Codex backend when supported.

params_schema.label: Background
params_schema.tooltip: Optional background hint such as auto or transparent when supported by runtime.

params_schema.label: Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Prompt text describing the desired edit target.

params_schema.label: Strength
params_schema.tooltip: How strongly the source image should be transformed.

params_schema.label: Size
params_schema.tooltip: Requested output size forwarded to the Codex backend when supported.

params_schema.label: Background
params_schema.tooltip: Optional background hint such as auto or transparent when supported by runtime.
